title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 12 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 12/02/2025
Image reference: 2025-02-12_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-february-12-2025_img1.png
Bulkers: Mid age values down slightly on last week, whilst newbuild values for larger tonnage firmed
Handy BC Unity North (37,600 DWT, Apr 2015, Oshima) sold SS/DD due to unknown Greek buyers for USD 16.5 mil, VV Value USD 17.95 mil
Handy BC (Open Hatch) ES Kure (33,000 DWT, Mar 2012, Kanda) sold DD due to unknown Vietnamese for 12.9 mil, VV Value USD 13.05 mil
Tankers: Tanker values have remained stable however S&P activity is under pressure with a number deals failing due to uncertainty surrounding buyers
VLCC Wafrah (317,700 DWT, Feb 2007, Hyundai Samho HI) sold DD Due to undisclosed buyers for USD 40.5 mil, VV Value USD 41.86 mil
Containers: Midage Sub Panamax are up this week following recent sales, modern Feedermaxes are down. 4x Handy Cont Delphis Finland, Delphis Bothnia, Delphis Gdansk, Delphis Riga (1,926 TEU, 2016-2017,Hanjin HI) sold to CMA CGM for USD 120 mil en bloc, VV Value USD 119.74 mil.
